supersession_reason: The label-only HMM family (program_o_hobs_prelearner_v1) produced clean primary-cell development headroom but (a) failed cross-cell robustness and (b) obtained part of its visible-ReT gain by increasing actual transported payload, not by allocation at matched throughput. A direct oracle-parameter recomputation (belief_extreme with TRUE rho/share per cell) changed 0/192 trajectories, proving the failure is decisional-structure, not parametric; auto-calibration cannot repair it. The correct H_obs comparator is a finite, pre-registered state-rich classical controller family, measured against a throughput-matched frontier so it targets the same construct the perfect-information ceiling was certified under.
scientific_scope: Observable adaptive value of a finite, pre-registered, non-anticipative state-rich CLASSICAL controller family in the disclosed two-product Program O researcher extension. A PASS establishes H_obs>0 via classical control only. It does NOT authorize a learner, does NOT confirm neural Paper 2, does NOT estimate the real MFSC product mix, and does NOT authorize Paper 3.

parent_hpi_evidence.throughput_control_note: The certified H_PI held gross_production_quantity delta = 0 and all charged/reserved resources equal. The clairvoyant value came from reallocating the C/H split at fixed throughput, NOT from moving more freight. H_obs MUST be measured under the same matched-throughput condition.

label_only_development_evidence_preserve.disposition: Retained and reported as the motivating signal for this gate: a minimal observable policy shows development headroom in the primary regime but fails cross-cell robustness and matched-throughput resource fairness. Not discarded, not promotable.
label_only_development_evidence_preserve.refutation_of_autocalibration: belief_extreme decides only by sign(belief_c-0.5); predicted_share_c-0.5 = (2*share-1)*(belief_c-0.5), so the action is invariant to the dominant_share magnitude, and symmetric transitions preserve sign. Oracle-true (rho,share) per cell changed 0/192 trajectories. A noisier online estimator can only match or worsen. Parametric self-calibration is therefore excluded.

physics.inherit_from: contracts/program_o_hobs_prelearner_v1.json physics block; identical physics, no change permitted

policy_model_parameters.rule: Every controller configuration is FROZEN on the primary-cell fit selection and applied UNCHANGED in all sensitivity cells. No controller is given the true sensitivity-cell (rho, share). Controllers may consume the label-history regime belief as a sufficient statistic (non-anticipative), but not the latent regime.

observation_contract.decision_barrier: At week t, every consumed event and every operational-state read must reflect only physical facts with timestamp strictly less than decision_start+168*t. The current decision's own effect is excluded.
observation_contract.state_snapshot_rule: Operational state is snapshotted from the certified full-DES state at the half-open barrier. Tagged WIP is counted exactly once (a committed lot is pipeline WIP, not also finished inventory). No current-week or future request quantity, no future skeleton arrival, no seed, no oracle, no score-time metric may enter the state vector.
allowed_state_vector: regime_belief_c (from the label-history HMM filter, non-anticipative, primary-cell parameters)
observation_contract.same_time_rule: The whitelist is strictly half-open at decision_start+168*t; physical events or state transitions timestamped exactly at the barrier are not observations for the week-t action.

finite_controller_family.principle: Small, strong, FINITE, fully enumerated. Each controller exposes at most two discrete hyperparameters on an enumerated grid. Internal solvers (min-cost flow, integer MPC, bounded DP) are exact/deterministic given the enumerated meta-parameters. No continuous parameter search of any kind; no post-fit retuning.

controllers.description: Target inventory-position cover per product; allocate the 3 batch rights to raise the product furthest below its target, favoring the minority product to protect worst-product fill.
Allocate batches to the product with highest pressure = backlog + pressure_weight_ratio*max_backlog_age, with a hysteresis band to avoid chattering across weeks.
Exact minimum-cost allocation of the 3 slots minimizing weighted (holding_ratio*inventory_position + backlog) subject to feasibility; deterministic exact solve per week.

Rolling integer program over a fixed horizon using belief-predicted request shares; maximize a predicted visible-ReT proxy subject to capacity and the same weekly action rights. Exact solve; only horizon and service weight enumerated.
Bounded backward dynamic program on (discretized regime belief, discretized inventory position) with coarse or fine discretization; exact given the grid.

finite_controller_family.source: TO BE IMPLEMENTED by the concurrent process at supply_chain/program_o_state_rich_hobs.py; hashes bound by the execution freeze, not this design freeze.
finite_controller_family.selection: Choose ONE configuration on the fit tapes by maximum mean canonical ReT among configurations that simultaneously (a) pass ALL mean guardrails including matched-throughput resource fairness, (b) beat every state placebo in mean, (c) pass the state-dependence certificate, and (d) yield a clean connected component of >=3 of 4 cells ON FIT. Deterministic tie-break: higher quantity-visible ReT, higher worst-product fill, fewer unresolved units, lower matched-throughput transport, controller order as listed, then lower hyperparameter index. If NO configuration satisfies (a)-(d) on fit, return STOP_NO_OBSERVABLE_HEADROOM and DO NOT open validation.

open_loop_denominator.definition: All base-4 length-eight calendars under the same weekly action rights and centered-minority scheduler.
open_loop_denominator.unconstrained_frontier_contrast_reported: Policy mean minus the maximum mean of all 65,536 calendars, reselected inside every paired bootstrap resample. Reported as a diagnostic upper bound on observed advantage.
open_loop_denominator.binding_matched_throughput_frontier: The BINDING H_obs contrast is policy mean minus the maximum mean over the THROUGHPUT-ADMISSIBLE static subset: calendars whose per-tape actual (loaded_departures, payload, downstream_vehicle_hours) are EACH >= the policy's corresponding per-tape actuals. This subset is recomputed and its max reselected inside every paired bootstrap resample. Rationale: the certified H_PI held gross production and all resources equal, so a legitimate observable conversion must beat a static that moves at least as much freight; beating only lower-throughput calendars is a throughput effect, not allocation intelligence.
open_loop_denominator.empty_admissible_set_rule: If for any tape no static calendar is throughput-admissible (policy out-transports the entire frontier on that tape), that tape is flagged and the gate returns STOP_RESOURCE_FRONTIER_CONFOUND.
open_loop_denominator.randomized_mixture_note: A tape-independent convex mixture cannot exceed its best pure member in expected ReT.

primary_metric.implementation: canonical compute_episode_metrics/request-snapshot aggregator only; hand-rolled ReT forbidden
primary_metric.workbook_formula_replay: 47,546 cached cells reproduced exactly when workbook Bt/Ut snapshots are injected
primary_metric.same_time_convention: repository-defined half-open request snapshot with zero-time completion/loss barrier
primary_metric.claim_limit: The formula and visible-row population are workbook-aligned. The endogenous same-time convention is a frozen researcher reconstruction, so any positive remains conditional on that explicit convention.

additional_sensitivities: union-of-generated-orders ReT with omitted rows scored zero

reserved_envelope_equality_given.rule: All configurations reserve and are charged the same fixed-clock entitlement; equal by construction. This is the base resource match, not the binding fairness test.

resource_contract.binding_fairness_test: Matched-throughput frontier (see open_loop_denominator.binding_matched_throughput_frontier). The policy must beat a static that transports at least as much. This closes the actual-utilization confound WITHOUT forbidding the legitimate mechanism (improving fill necessarily raises payload); it forbids only winning by out-transporting the comparator.
resource_contract.throughput_decomposition_reported: Report H_obs against (i) unconstrained frontier and (ii) matched-throughput frontier. The gap (i)-(ii) quantifies how much of the raw advantage is throughput rather than allocation.
resource_contract.stop_rule: If the matched-throughput H_obs is not positive where the unconstrained one is, or the admissible set is empty on any tape, return STOP_RESOURCE_FRONTIER_CONFOUND. Utilization quantities may not be relabeled after results.

state_placebos.stale_state: At week t use operational state as of week t-2 (delayed two weeks); do not update between.
state_placebos.cross_tape_state: Feed the operational-state stream from the tape 17 positions later in ascending seed order, with wraparound; the same fixed shift-17 mapping is reused unchanged on validation.
state_placebos.swapped_state: Swap the P_C and P_H state channels (inventory, backlog, age, committed lots) without changing the physical tape.
state_placebos.no_state: Ignore all operational state; act on the regime belief alone under a fixed rule (the information-null policy).
state_placebos.promotion_rule: The real-state controller must beat EVERY placebo with a simultaneous paired one-sided LCB95 greater than zero.

nulls.full_fungibility: With fully fungible products every controller must be transition- and metric-identical to the static frontier; H_obs=0 exactly.
nulls.fixed_common_product_season: The complete open-loop frontier must match the controller up to numerical tolerance.
nulls.rho50_or_share50: Diagnostic information-null sensitivity; not a replacement primary cell.

state_perturbation_counterfactuals: Swap the two products' (inventory, backlog, age) channels at an audited non-tie state: the action must map a -> 3-a (complementary allocation).
Increase the minority product's backlog by one batch-equivalent at an audited non-tie state: the batches allocated to the majority product must not increase.
state_dependence_certificate.required: The controller must beat modal and phase-only replacements with paired LCB95>0, satisfy every perturbation counterfactual at non-tie states, and beat the matched-throughput frontier at the practical gate. A controller that fails any perturbation direction returns STOP_STATE_INDEPENDENT_POLICY.

fit.note: Already opened by the label-only fit. Reused for development selection of this family; scientific integrity rests entirely on the sealed validation block opened once.

validation.note: Reserved for H_obs validation, never opened by the label-only gate. Opened once, only if the fit selection satisfies all fit-pass conditions including >=3 clean connected cells.

tape_blocks.future_learner_seeds_note: The 742-series is NOT learner-virgin. A confirmatory neural Paper 2 comparison requires a fresh, previously unopened seed block allocated by a new custody correction.

execution_sequence: Concurrent process implements supply_chain/program_o_state_rich_hobs.py and scripts/screen_program_o_state_rich_hobs_fit.py, plus tests; commits with this contract, seed custody, watcher, and a fit-only execution freeze binding source hashes.
Open fit block 7420001-7420048 once under whole-session VPS custody; select one configuration by the frozen rule; retrieve and hash all artifacts.
Proceed to validation ONLY if the fit selection satisfies every fit_pass_rule condition, including the >=3 clean connected-cell requirement. Otherwise emit STOP and stop.
Commit the selected configuration and a separate validation execution freeze.
Open validation block 7420049-7420096 once under whole-session VPS custody; run 10,000 paired bootstrap with the matched-throughput frontier reselected each resample.
Run independent checksum/custody verification and direct full-DES replay of the selected controller's realized calendars.

fit_pass_rule.note: The >=3 clean connected-cell precondition ON FIT is the decisive addition versus the label-only gate: it prevents opening the sealed validation tapes with a policy already known to fail cross-cell guardrail cleanliness.

validation_pass_rule.primary_and_connected_component_rule: Primary rho75_share90 and a connected component of at least three of four cells spanning both rho and share levels must have simultaneous one-sided LCB95(H_obs over the matched-throughput frontier) >= 0.01.

downstream_ladder_documented_not_authori.on_pass: H_obs>0 established via CLASSICAL observable control at matched throughput. This is NOT neural Paper 2. The passing controller becomes a mandatory comparator.
downstream_ladder_documented_not_authori.neural_paper2_gate: Freeze a learner; comparator = elementwise maximum over {open-loop matched-throughput frontier, base_stock, max_pressure, min_cost_flow, integer_mpc, belief_dp, label-only interpretable}. The learner must win on a FRESH virgin confirmatory seed block (not 742-series) and pass the state-dependence and trajectory audits. Only then is neural Paper 2 confirmed.
downstream_ladder_documented_not_authori.paper3_gate: Begins only after neural Paper 2: retained/persistent value vs reset/scratch/frozen, fresh campaigns, matched compute.

implementation_status: DESIGN_PREREGISTRATION. Source files do not yet exist; their hashes are bound by the fit-only execution freeze the implementing process commits, not by this design freeze.
